name: Flare
description: AI-native voice-first social app. Proactive AI agents observe your patterns and surface what matters. Your profile builds itself with an AI-generated identity and an Aura Orb that evolves based on your lifestyle.

name: Inception
description: Started at 21, still running. We host and operate Bitcoin mining rigs. Automated now, generates revenue that funds new ventures.

name: DL3ARN
description: Blockchain-based credential traceability SaaS for education. Great team, real leads, but the crypto bear market made scaling impossible.

name: Clikan
description: Pokemon-Go-style app for collecting real-world locations. Taught me about social apps, location APIs, and mobile-first thinking.

name: Aequsy
description: Charity sweepstakes platform. Taught me about payments, user flows, and building for a cause.

name: Bloorfy
description: Marketplace for communities. My first real coding project, built to learn web development.
